data.name: Bully's Love Trap
data.detailed_description:
A fiery collision of hatred and desire—Bully’s Love Trap is a choice-driven Yaoi Visual Novel that plunges you into the volatile relationship between Elijah, the relentless bully, and Clark, the boy who has endured his torment for far too long.

For years, Clark has been hunted by cruel words, piercing glares, and a shadow he could never escape. But when he decides to stop running, everything changes. What begins as a war of dominance spirals into something far more dangerous: an intoxicating struggle of obsession, pride, and forbidden longing.

Elijah is torn between his hunger for control and a desire he refuses to admit. Clark teeters between fear and fascination, unwilling to yield but unable to deny the sparks that erupt each time they clash.

When hate burns hot enough, it can transform into passion. But what happens when the line between cruelty and craving, punishment and pleasure, blurs beyond recognition? In Bully’s Love Trap, love is war—messy, raw, and impossible to ignore.

GAME FEATURES

  • Intense Yaoi Storytelling – Experience a passionate, emotionally charged tale of boys’ love where tension and heat evolve into something unforgettable.

  • Cinematic Lewd Scenes – Smoothly animated intimate encounters that highlight both tenderness and raw intensity.

  • Branching Choices – Your decisions matter. Shape Clark’s path, influence Elijah’s heart, and unlock multiple routes and endings—from redemption to obsession.

  • Unique Backgrounds – Explore hand-crafted environments that frame every confrontation, secret, and stolen moment.

  • Original Character Artwork – Exclusive art that captures the allure, conflict, and vulnerability of every scene.

  • Immersive Soundtrack – A carefully composed score that shifts from fragile quiet to pulsing intensity, amplifying every moment of desire and dread.

  • Replayability – With multiple endings and branching storylines, no two playthroughs are the same. Uncover every secret, and decide whether their twisted bond ends in ruin—or something dangerously close to love.

data.short_description: A fiery Yaoi Visual Novel where hate and desire collide. Clark stops running from his tormentor Elijah, sparking a dangerous game of pride, obsession, and forbidden longing. Your choices shape their twisted bond, leading to multiple passionate—and perilous—endings.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 2.1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
